name: snake-game
description: Snake Game - Node.js Express Server & Project Orchestration

scripts.build:wasm: cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && wasm-bindgen target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/snake_game.wasm --out-dir pkg --target web && cp pkg/*.wasm pkg/*.js pkg/*.d.ts frontend/public/
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:frontend
scripts.dev: npm run build:wasm && npm run dev:frontend
